start.speaker: Troguon
start.text: Hey there. What are you doing here?

choices.text: I have no idea. I want to go out!
So i have that spare part!

quest.speaker: Troguon
quest.text: I have this blue keycard. I think i spotted blue door somewhere. Maybe it fits. But i want spare part for my robot! If you can make to self destruct that flying one by giving that part out, I give it to you.

give_card.speaker: Troguon
give_card.text: Here your card to freedom! Or not. I never tried it.

i_wont.speaker: Troguon
i_wont.text: You will be stuck in this extremely boring place forever. Like me.

what.speaker: Troguon
what.text: It seems to be eternal and boring. Doguon thinks its torture chamber, but i think its fragment of imagination of some mild mind.
